Class Unit

java.lang.Object
entities.Unit
public abstract class Unit extends Object
Represents a controllable character or entity on the board. Tracks base stats (health, movement, attack) and current board position.

  • Method Details

    • getSpritePath

      public String getSpritePath()
      Retrieves the dynamic path for this unit's sprite based on their owning player's kingdom. IMPORTANT: This assumes a specific file structure: /assets/units/{kingdomName}/{UNIT_TYPE}
      Returns:
      The file path string for the sprite image.

    • getImage

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getImage()

    • turnStart

      public void turnStart()
      Resets currentMovement to the maxMovement speed at the start of the turn.
